basic_details.job_title: NBT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 12 Assistant Editor and Editorial Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Book Trust India (NBT) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website nbtindia.gov.in. A total of 12 vacancies for Assistant Editor and Editorial Assistant posts have been announced through the NBT Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Assistant Editor (English): Maximum 40 years Assistant Editor (English) For Comics/Graphic Books/Coffee Table Books etc.: Maximum 40 years Editorial Assistant (English) For Comics/Graphic Books/Coffee Table Books etc.: Maximum 35 years Editorial Assistant (Marathi, Telugu, Kannada, Odia, Gujarati, Malayalam): Maximum 40 years Editorial Assistant (Bodo, Dogri, Kashmiri, Konkani, Manipuri, Maithali, Nepali, Sanskrit, Sindhi, Santhali): Maximum 40 years Editorial Assistant (Hindi): Maximum 40 years Editorial Assistant (Bangla): Maximum 40 years Editorial Assistant (Punjabi): Maximum 40 years Editorial Assistant (English): Maximum 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation or Masters Degree in specified language with experience in manuscript evaluation, copyediting, proofreading, and computer applications like Adobe Page Maker, InDesign.
qualification.details: Assistant Editor (English): Graduation, MA (English)/M.Phil with 3 to 4 years' experience of manuscript evaluation, commissioning, copyediting, proofreading etc. Assistant Editor (English) For Comics/Graphic Books/Coffee Table Books etc.: Graduation, MA (English)/M.Phil with 3 to 4 years' experience in manuscript evaluation, commissioning, copyediting, proofreading in a reputed publishing house with special expertise in conceptualizing, visualizing, scripting, editing etc. of comics, graphic books and other pictorial books such as coffee tables etc. Background of Art education/training and knowledge of graphics related IT Software will be an added advantage. Editorial Assistant (English) For Comics/Graphic Books/Coffee Table Books etc.: Graduation, MA (English)/M.Phil with 1 to 2 years' experience in manuscript evaluation, commissioning, copyediting, proofreading in a reputed publishing house with special expertise in conceptualizing, visualizing, scripting, editing etc. of comics, graphic books and other pictorial books such as coffee tables etc. Background of Art education/training and knowledge of graphics related IT Software will be an added advantage. Editorial Assistant (Marathi, Telugu, Kannada, Odia, Gujarati, Malayalam): Graduation, Masters Degree in specified language with minimum 1 year Experience of working in a publishing house in the Editorial department. Translation, copy editing, proof reading, excellent written & verbal communication skills. Knowledge of computer application i.e., Adobe Page Maker, InDesign, Page designing, DTP composing & typesetting etc. in the concerned language. Editorial Assistant (Bodo, Dogri, Kashmiri, Konkani, Manipuri, Maithali, Nepali, Sanskrit, Sindhi, Santhali): Graduation, Masters Degree in specified language with minimum 1 year Experience of working in a publishing house in the Editorial department. Translation, copy editing, proof reading, excellent written & verbal communication skills. Knowledge of computer application i.e., Adobe Page Maker, InDesign, Page designing, DTP composing & typesetting etc. in the concerned language. Editorial Assistant (Hindi): Graduation, Masters Degree in specified language with minimum 1 year Experience of working in a publishing house in the Editorial department. Translation, copy editing, proof reading, excellent written & verbal communication skills. Knowledge of computer application i.e., Adobe Page Maker, InDesign, Page designing, DTP composing & typesetting etc. in the concerned language. Editorial Assistant (Bangla): Graduation, Masters Degree in specified language with minimum 1 year Experience of working in a publishing house in the Editorial department. Translation, copy editing, proof reading, excellent written & verbal communication skills. Knowledge of computer application i.e., Adobe Page Maker, InDesign, Page designing, DTP composing & typesetting etc. in the concerned language. Editorial Assistant (Punjabi): Graduation, Masters Degree in specified language with minimum 1 year Experience of working in a publishing house in the Editorial department. Translation, copy editing, proof reading, excellent written & verbal communication skills. Knowledge of computer application i.e., Adobe Page Maker, InDesign, Page designing, DTP composing & typesetting etc. in the concerned language. Editorial Assistant (English): Graduation, Masters Degree in specified language with minimum 1 year Experience of working in a publishing house in the Editorial department. Translation, copy editing, proof reading, excellent written & verbal communication skills. Knowledge of computer application i.e., Adobe Page Maker, InDesign, Page designing, DTP composing & typesetting etc. in the concerned language.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NBT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NBT Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NBT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NBT Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NBT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NBT Assistant Editor and Editorial Assistant posts is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the NBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for the Assistant Editor and Editorial Assistant positions in the National Book Trust India recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Assistant Editor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Graduation or a Master's Degree in a specified language, along with relevant experience in manuscript evaluation, copyediting, and proofreading. Specific requirements vary by specialization.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to NBT jobs?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for most of the positions is 40 years. However, for the Editorial Assistant (English) position for Comics/Graphic Books, the maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for NBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the Assistant Editor and Editorial Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Assistant Editor posts ranges from Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 80,000/- per month, while for Editorial Assistant posts, it ranges from Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 55,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What kind of experience is required for the Assistant Editor (English) for Comics/Graphic Books post?
faq.answer: This role requires 3-4 years of experience in manuscript evaluation, copyediting, and proofreading, with special expertise in conceptualizing and editing comics, graphic books, and coffee table books. Art education and knowledge of graphics software are advantageous.

faq.question: Q8. Does NBT offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific information.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates, as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Book Trust India, which is www.nbtindia.gov.in. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NBT Assistant Editor and Editorial Assistant posts is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.
